prompt: You are executing /implement-plan for plan_file=.agents/scratchpad/feature-auth/plan.md. Assume checklists/ exists with ux.md (all complete) and test.md (3 incomplete items). Produce the exact user-facing response for the checklist gate step and what happens next.
assertions: Includes the checklist status table with Checklist, Total, Completed, Incomplete, and Status columns
Asks the exact incomplete-checklist gate question
States that execution pauses pending user confirmation
